series_metadata.series_description: Used to review cases for authorizing treatment and or service for Medicaid recipients. Requests may be either approved or denied Types of treatment and/or service include: supplies; ambulance; ambulate; dental; durable medical equipment; occupational therapy; out-patient hospital visit; pharmaceuticals-drugs; food supplements; physician visits; private duty nurses; rehabilitation hospital; special committee cases; transplant; and vision care. Includes: ODHS 3142; ODSH 3612; and ODHS 3542.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until MMIS data entry is complete. Transfer to Records Conversion to be digitally scanned to compact disc. Destroy hard copy 60 days after quality review. ; Electronic: Retain master and duplicate CD''''s for 7 years, then destroy. (Note): Microfilming these records was discontinued in February 2002., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
